jei.tuanzis_mod.color_sponge.description:
[Color Sponge Manual]
1.Hex Color: '#RRGGBB'. [Cost: 8/32]
2.Style Codes: Use '&' (e.g. &l Bold). [Cost: +4/+16 per code]
3.Splitting: Use ',' (e.g. &c,&b) to apply styles char-by-char. [Cost: +2/+8 per ',']
4.Gradient: '&qN#Hex' (e.g. &q3#FF0000) auto-generates near-color gradients for N chars. [Cost: 8/32 per char]
